data: {"commit": "510b24f6be095fc5c6dffcde7f764486c8ce5d7e", "exact_command": ".venv/bin/python scripts/local_scout_distill.py --device mps --teacher openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo --student openai/whisper-tiny --mini-shards 1 --epochs 1 --batch-size 1 --ckpt models/local_scout_tiny_turbo_kd && .venv/bin/python scripts/local_eval.py --model models/local_scout_tiny_turbo_kd/stage_a_flagship --tag scout_smoke_check --device mps --limit 20", "failure_example": {"accent_family": "swahili", "clip_id": "afrispeech-200-eval_1108d50988402600", "hypothesis": "The T-Tarii Adenomas Adenomas have the most common P-Tarii T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T-T", "reference": "Pituitary Adenomas Adenomas are the most common pituitary tumours.", "wer": 6.6667}, "license_summary": {"manifest": "benchmark/manifest.csv", "rows": 353, "summary": "AfriSpeech-200 eval; CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0; redistributable=no; metrics-only score-and-cite, not shipped audio."}, "log": "logs/phase_c_scout.log", "per_group_table_key": "metrics_json.by_accent_family", "progress_json": "models/local_scout_tiny_turbo_kd/progress.json", "provenance_note": "Historical log shows collapse guard abort at step 100; command reconstructed from log and current script interface because original shell line was not preserved.", "release_gate_decision": {"failures": ["average_wer regressed: 0.9431 > 0.5633", "worst_group_wer regressed: 1.5556 > 1.0442", "parity_gap regressed: 1.2431 > 0.638"], "passed": false}, "split": "20 held-out eval rows; smoke subset only", "workspace_dirty_at_recording": true}
